allow: Bash(python manage.py shell -c "from api.models import Rank, Corps, Speciality; print\(''Ranks:'', list\(Rank.objects.values\(''code'',''label''\)[:5]\)\); print\(''Corps:'', list\(Corps.objects.values\(''code'',''label''\)\)\); print\(''Specialities:'', list\(Speciality.objects.values\(''code'',''label''\)[:5]\)\)")
